channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: About 67% of banned Anthropic accounts used AI to prep for cyberattacks
item.description: AI firm Anthropic mapped a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats, finding that malicious actors are quickly becoming more dangerous with AI.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Bitmine eyes dividend-paying preferred shares, echoing Strategy’s playbook
item.description: The move comes as Ether prices slumped to a 14-month low below $1,750 on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Coinbase freezes $3M tied to Southeast Asia crypto fraud networks
item.description: Authorities around the world have been heavily targeting scam infrastructure this year, with joint actions involving the US, UAE, China, Austria and Albania.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: CFTC follows SEC in scrapping ‘no-deny’ policy for settlements
item.description: CFTC Chairman Mike Selig says the rescission of its “no-deny” policy means it now has more flexibility when settling enforcement actions.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Israel’s tax authority ‘disappointed’ in voluntary crypto disclosures: Report
item.description: After expecting billions of dollars worth of crypto holdings to be reported during a voluntary disclosure period, the country's tax office said only 58 filers took advantage of the procedure.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Wyoming executive order to guide AI data center development
item.description: Wyoming Governor Mark Gordon signed an executive order supporting AI data center development as the state seeks to attract advanced computing and technology investment.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: US Treasury secretary signals progress on Bitcoin reserve, CLARITY Act
item.description: Scott Bessent said that the Treasury Department was “proceeding with all deliberate speed” on President Donald Trump’s 2025 executive order to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve and digital asset stockpile.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Revolut US bank plans stablecoins alongside FDIC-insured accounts: Report
item.description: Reuters reported that Revolut plans to integrate stablecoins into its future US bank as more fintech and crypto companies chase federal banking approvals.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Price predictions 6/3: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, HYPE, DOGE, ZEC, ADA, XLM
item.description: Bitcoin is at risk of a drop below $65,000, but buyers are expected to mount a strong defense as the price nears the crucial $60,000 level.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Rakesh Upadhyay

item.title: Crypto PAC-supported candidates sweep US state primaries after media buys
item.description: Nearly a dozen candidates across three US states won their primaries or will advance to the November election after they were supported by $3.5 million in ads funded by crypto industry-aligned PACs.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Agentic payment activity tops 100M transactions on Base
item.description: New data suggests AI-driven payment rails are evolving beyond experimentation as users are making more higher-value transfers.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Bitcoin copying 2022 'almost perfectly' as trader sees key support failing
item.description: Bitcoin traders warned of a key BTC price support trend line failing as 2022 bear market history continued to repeat.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Crypto firms face July 1 EU cutoff as MiCA grace period ends
item.description: The ESMA says crypto companies without MiCA authorization must stop serving EU clients from July 1, even if their licence applications remain under review.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Hyperliquid bear turns bullish after losing over $46M shorting HYPE
item.description: The whale is now backing Arthur Hayes’ favored HYPE, ZEC and NEAR plays, signaling a sharp pivot toward momentum-led crypto bets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Ethereum drops to 14-week lows: Can ETH price hold $1.8K support?
item.description: Ethereum price slides to a 14-week low as weakening demand and persistent ETF outflows put the key $1,800 support at risk.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Binance discloses revenue-sharing deal with Alpaca
item.description: A Binance legal document disclosed a revenue-sharing agreement with Alpaca, which includes sharing 50% of the stock custodian’s order flow revenue with the cryptocurrency exchange.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Binance to end NFT support on exchange, shift service to wallet
item.description: Binance exchange said it will move NFT support from its exchange to its non-custodial wallet and offered users 30 days to migrate their NFTs.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Kraken parent Payward brings tokenized IPO access to retail investors
item.description: Kraken and xStocks Alliance will let eligible users seek allocations in US IPOs at the offering price through tokenized shares in coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Zcash fixes Orchard bug after emergency network upgrade
item.description: Zcash Open Development Lab said the network briefly became unstable as miners upgraded, while the Zcash Foundation said there was no evidence of an exploit.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Trezor says Safe 7 chip flaw found by Ledger does not put funds at risk
item.description: Trezor and Tropic Square disclosed a TROPIC01 chip vulnerability found during a Ledger Donjon audit, saying the Safe 7 wallet and user funds remain secure.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Russian ruble stablecoin A7A5 grows despite Western sanctions: CertiK
item.description: Russian ruble-backed stablecoin A7A5 processed over $110 billion in transactions despite Western sanctions, according to CertiK.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: UK regulator warns Premier League clubs over unauthorized crypto sponsors
item.description: The FCA has urged clubs to rethink deals with unauthorized crypto and trading sponsors, warning that fans risk losing all their money and teams face legal and reputational fallout.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Mastercard expands support to USDC, PYUSD, RLUSD stablecoin settlement
item.description: The payments giant said USDC, PYUSD, RLUSD and other stablecoins will support new settlement options across multiple blockchains.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Bitcoin's crash to $65K triggers $1.8B in crypto liquidations
item.description: Bitcoin's drop to $65,000 triggered over $1.8 billion in crypto liquidations as traders brace for a test of $60,000 as support.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Bitcoin has hit 'max fear' below $67K as analysis sees BTC price rebound
item.description: Bitcoin sparked two-month lows in the Crypto Fear & Greed Index while analysis predicted a "catch-up" with record highs in stocks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: New York and EU’s finance watchdogs team up to police stablecoins
item.description: Some of the information that New York and the European Union’s watchdogs will share includes the issued stablecoins, total volume in circulation and the number of holders.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Bitcoin falls below $66K as US and Iran launch new strikes
item.description: Bitcoin saw its largest daily drop since early February on Tuesday as the cryptocurrency shed more than $4,500 in a single day.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: US Treasury issues sanctions on Iran, targets 4 crypto exchanges
item.description: The sanctions come four days after Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US had seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iranian crypto exchanges and wallets since late February.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Modern robots impress, but are years away from replacing humans
item.description: AI robotics company Figure posted several videos on X throughout May showcasing its robots performing basic tasks, including cleaning a room and sorting packages.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte
